object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Circular decorative wall clock or medallion with a dark frame and light face, mounted on the wall on the left side of the corridor opening; serves as a focal wall decoration visible from the living area.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the left corridor wall roughly between the left doorway and the kitchen opening

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.long_form_open_description: Large round decorative clock with a dark frame mounted on the right hallway wall at approximately eye level between the open door and the living area. Acts as a focal wall decoration along the corridor.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on right wall, roughly opposite the dining table area; about 1–1.5 m before the living room space.
